Class Player

java.lang.Object
model.entity.Entity
model.entity.Player
public class Player extends Entity
The entity that represents the Player and can be controlled it's movement and it's interaction by the user.

  • Constructor Details

    • Player

      public Player(float x, float y, Level currentLv)
      Player constructor that initialize the entity hitbox together with the Player datas
      Parameters:
      x - Position x where the entity spawns into
      y - Position y where the entity spawns into
      currentLv - Level that is currently in (used to get the datas for the collision)

  • Method Details

    • update

      public void update()
      Player update

    • playerTransition

      public void playerTransition(Level newCurrentLv, int x, int y)
      During a level transition it sets the new x, new y, new lvData and new lfData
      Parameters:
      newCurrentLv - Simply gets the new datas from the level that transition into
      x - New original x position, setting as a new spawn point
      y - New original y position, setting as a new spawn point

    • kill

      public void kill()
      Kills the player, reducing his lives too

      public int getCurrentSleep()

    • addPuzzlePiece

      public void addPuzzlePiece(int piece)
      Adds the piece on one of the puzzles and if is all the puzzles has 4 pieces then the Player has the complete password
      Parameters:
      piece - The puzzle piece (represented as number. Example the first puzzle piece is "0")

    • getPieces

      public int getPieces(int index)
      Checks the amount of puzzle pieces to the give index
      Parameters:
      index - Index where to get the puzzle

    • getPuzzlePieces

      public int getPuzzlePieces()
      Gives the total of puzzle pieces gotten

    • numPuzzleCompleted

      public int numPuzzleCompleted()
      Checks the number of puzzles completed by check each index if the int is 4 (The total amount of piece that has a puzzle)

    • getLives

      public int getLives()

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Put the player in the original state

    • isL

      public boolean isL()
      Left input check
      Returns:
      Returns a boolean that tells if the Player is moving on the left

    • setL

      public void setL(boolean l)
      Set left input state
      Parameters:
      l - Boolean to set

    • isR

      public boolean isR()
      Right input check
      Returns:
      Returns a boolean that tells if the Player is moving on the right

    • setR

      public void setR(boolean r)
      Set right input state
      Parameters:
      r - Boolean to set

    • isJ

      public boolean isJ()
      Jump input check
      Returns:
      Returns a boolean that tells if the Player is jumping

    • setJ

      public void setJ(boolean j)
      Set jump input state
      Parameters:
      j - Boolean to set
